apis.name: Tabs
apis.purpose: Tab switching container for bottom/top tab navigation with TabContent children

apis.name: TabContent
apis.purpose: Content view for each tab within Tabs, supports string/CustomBuilder/BottomTabBarStyle tabBar

apis.name: Column
apis.purpose: Vertical linear layout container with optional space parameter

apis.name: Row
apis.purpose: Horizontal linear layout container with optional space parameter

apis.name: Stack
apis.purpose: Stack container that overlays children in order, support alignContent for child alignment

apis.name: Flex
apis.purpose: Flexbox layout container with direction, wrap, justifyContent, alignItems support

apis.name: Scroll
apis.purpose: Scrollable container for content exceeding parent bounds, configurable scroll direction

apis.name: List
apis.purpose: List container with lazy loading via LazyForEach/Repeat, supports cachedCount and initialIndex

apis.name: Grid
apis.purpose: Grid container with rows/columns layout, supports cross-row/column GridItem via GridLayoutOptions

apis.name: Navigation
apis.purpose: Root navigation view container with NavPathStack routing, title, menus, toolbar support

apis.name: PageTransition
apis.purpose: Page enter/exit transition animations via pageTransition() lifecycle hook, used with router

notableFindings: Navigator component is deprecated since API 13 -- use Navigation with NavPathStack instead
@ohos.router API is deprecated since API 18 -- recommended use Navigation component or UIContext.getRouter()
BottomTabBarStyle is the standard way to create bottom icon+text tab bars (no underline, default 48vp height from API 12)
Flex has secondary layout performance overhead; use Column/Row for performance-sensitive linear layouts
List lazy loading requires LazyForEach or Repeat with virtualScroll; cachedCount enables pre-loading
Grid performance improves significantly when GridLayoutOptions.regularSize is set even without irregular items

missingApis.name: Navigator/router
missingApis.reason: Navigator component is deprecated since API 13, @ohos.router is deprecated since API 18. The recommended replacement is Navigation with NavPathStack. Both are documented for legacy reference.
